sql.query: SELECT ev.value, ev.name, fa.dateacct, COALESCE(bp.name, fa.description) AS groupbyname, fa.amtacctdr, fa.amtacctcr, (fa.amtacctdr - fa.amtacctcr) AS total, fa.fact_acct_group_id AS id FROM fact_acct fa JOIN c_elementvalue ev ON ev.c_elementvalue_id = fa.account_id LEFT JOIN c_bpartner bp ON bp.c_bpartner_id = fa.c_bpartner_id WHERE fa.ad_client_id IN ('__CLIENT_ID__') AND fa.factaccttype NOT IN ('R', 'C') AND ('__DATEFROM__' = '' OR fa.dateacct >= '__DATEFROM__'::date) AND ('__DATETO__' = '' OR fa.dateacct <= '__DATETO__'::date) AND ('__AMTFROM__' = '' OR fa.amtacctdr >= '__AMTFROM__'::numeric OR fa.amtacctcr >= '__AMTFROM__'::numeric) AND ('__AMTTO__' = '' OR fa.amtacctdr <= '__AMTTO__'::numeric OR fa.amtacctcr <= '__AMTTO__'::numeric) ORDER BY ev.value, ev.name, fa.dateacct
